title: Brent oil tops $107 per barrel after Iran peace talks stall
snippet: Brent $107.89 (+2%), WTI $96.63 (+2%). Oil jumped after 2nd round peace talks unraveled. Brent up from $105.33 Friday close. Continued Hormuz disruptions and failed diplomatic efforts support elevated prices.
tag_reason: New price level: Brent $107.89, highest since Apr 24 peak
